glosses.yue: 引起興趣; 令人困惑
glosses.vi: gây tò mò; gây bối rối
glosses.ja: 興味を引く; 困惑させる

translations.es: Este mensaje realmente intriga a Marie.
translations.de: Diese Nachricht macht Marie wirklich neugierig.
translations.ko: 이 메시지는 마리를 정말 궁금하게 한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 这条消息真的让玛丽感到好奇。
translations.yue: 呢個訊息真係令瑪麗好好奇。
translations.pt: Esta mensagem realmente intriga a Marie.
translations.he: ההודעה הזאת באמת מסקרנת את מארי.
translations.vi: Tin nhắn này thực sự khiến Marie tò mò.
translations.ar: هذه الرسالة تثير فضول ماري حقًا.
translations.hu: Ez az üzenet tényleg felkelti Marie érdeklődését.
translations.hi: यह संदेश सच में मैरी को उत्सुक करता है।
translations.el: Αυτό το μήνυμα πραγματικά εξάπτει την περιέργεια της Μαρί.
translations.nb: Denne meldingen gjør Marie virkelig nysgjerrig.
translations.id: Pesan ini benar-benar membuat Marie penasaran.
translations.sv: Det här meddelandet gör verkligen Marie nyfiken.
translations.ro: Acest mesaj chiar o intrigă pe Marie.
translations.cs: Tato zpráva Marii opravdu vrtá hlavou.
translations.da: Denne besked gør virkelig Marie nysgerrig.
translations.fi: Tämä viesti todella herättää Marien uteliaisuuden.
translations.ja: このメッセージは本当にマリーの好奇心をかき立てる。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner; masculine singular; modifies the noun 'message' and forms the subject NP.
Common noun; masculine singular; head of the subject NP 'Ce message' and subject of the verb 'intrigue'.
Main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicate of the clause; takes 'Marie' as direct object; modified by the adverb 'vraiment'.
Adverb of degree; modifies 'intrigue' to intensify the action.
Proper noun; feminine singular; direct object of 'intrigue'.

translations.es: Tu historia intriga a los niños.
translations.de: Deine Geschichte macht die Kinder neugierig.
translations.it: La tua storia incuriosisce i bambini.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的故事让孩子们很好奇。
translations.yue: 你嘅故事令啲細路好好奇。
translations.vi: Câu chuyện của bạn khiến bọn trẻ tò mò.
translations.hu: A történeted felkelti a gyerekek érdeklődését.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी कहानी बच्चों को उत्सुक करती है।
translations.el: Η ιστορία σου εξάπτει την περιέργεια των παιδιών.
translations.ro: Povestea ta îi intrigă pe copii.
translations.ja: あなたの話は子どもたちの好奇心をかき立てる。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular possessive determiner; modifies 'histoire'; used here before a vowel-initial feminine noun; part of the subject NP.
Common noun; feminine singular; head of the subject NP; subject of 'intrigue'.
Main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicate; takes 'les enfants' as direct object.
Definite article; plural; introduces the object NP 'enfants'.
Common noun; plural; head of the object NP; direct object of 'intrigue'.

sentences.target: Ce mystère commence à intriguer tout le monde.
sentences.reading: /sə mistɛʁ kɔmɑ̃s a ɛ̃tʁiɡe tulə mɔ̃d./

translations.fr: Ce mystère commence à intriguer tout le monde.
translations.ipa: /sə mistɛʁ kɔmɑ̃s a ɛ̃tʁiɡe tulə mɔ̃d./
translations.en: This mystery is starting to intrigue everyone.
translations.es: Este misterio está empezando a intrigar a todos.
translations.de: Dieses Geheimnis fängt an, alle neugierig zu machen.
translations.it: Questo mistero sta iniziando a incuriosire tutti.
translations.ko: 이 미스터리는 모두의 호기심을 자극하기 시작했다.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个谜团开始让大家好奇起来。
translations.yue: 呢個謎團開始令大家好奇。
translations.pt: Este mistério está começando a intrigar a todos.
translations.he: התעלומה הזו מתחילה לסקרן את כולם.
translations.vi: Bí ẩn này đang bắt đầu khiến mọi người tò mò.
translations.ar: هذا اللغز يبدأ بإثارة فضول الجميع.
translations.nl: Dit mysterie begint iedereen nieuwsgierig te maken.
translations.hu: Ez a rejtély kezd mindenkit érdekelni.
translations.hi: यह रहस्य सबको उत्सुक करने लगा है।
translations.el: Αυτό το μυστήριο αρχίζει να εξάπτει την περιέργεια όλων.
translations.nb: Dette mysteriet begynner å gjøre alle nysgjerrige.
translations.id: Misteri ini mulai membuat semua orang penasaran.
translations.sv: Det här mysteriet börjar göra alla nyfikna.
translations.ro: Acest mister începe să-i intrige pe toți.
translations.da: Dette mysterium begynder at gøre alle nysgerrige.
translations.fi: Tämä mysteeri alkaa herättää kaikkien uteliaisuutta.
translations.ja: この謎はみんなの好奇心を刺激し始めている。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner; masculine singular; modifies 'mystère'; part of the subject NP.
Common noun; masculine singular; head of the subject NP; subject of 'commence'.
Main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes the infinitival complement 'à intriguer' indicating the onset of an action.
Preposition; introduces the infinitive 'intriguer' as a complement to 'commence'.
Infinitive verb; complement governed by 'à'; transitive; selects 'tout le monde' as its direct object.
Quantifying determiner; modifies 'le monde'; in the fixed expression 'tout le monde' meaning 'everyone'; part of the object NP.
Definite article; introduces 'monde' within the NP 'tout le monde'.
Common noun; with 'tout le' forms the idiomatic NP 'tout le monde' ('everyone'); direct object of 'intriguer'.

sentences.target: Nous intriguons notre voisin sans le vouloir.
sentences.reading: /nu z‿ɛ̃tʁiɡɔ̃ nɔtʁə vwazɛ̃ sɑ̃ lə vulwaʁ./

translations.fr: Nous intriguons notre voisin sans le vouloir.
translations.ipa: /nu z‿ɛ̃tʁiɡɔ̃ nɔtʁə vwazɛ̃ sɑ̃ lə vulwaʁ./
translations.en: We intrigue our neighbor without meaning to.
translations.es: Intrigamos a nuestro vecino sin querer.
translations.de: Wir machen unseren Nachbarn ungewollt neugierig.
translations.it: Incuriosiamo il nostro vicino senza volerlo.
translations.ko: 우리는 의도치 않게 이웃을 궁금하게 만든다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们无意中让邻居感到好奇。
translations.yue: 我哋無意之間令鄰居覺得好奇。
translations.pt: Nós deixamos nosso vizinho curioso sem querer.
translations.he: אנחנו מסקרנים את השכן שלנו בלי להתכוון.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi vô tình làm hàng xóm tò mò.
translations.ar: نحن نثير فضول جارنا من دون قصد.
translations.nl: We maken onze buurman onbedoeld nieuwsgierig.
translations.hu: Akaratunkon kívül felkeltjük a szomszédunk érdeklődését.
translations.hi: हम अनजाने में अपने पड़ोसी को उत्सुक कर देते हैं।
translations.el: Κάνουμε τον γείτονά μας να απορεί χωρίς να το θέλουμε.
translations.nb: Vi gjør naboen vår nysgjerrig uten å ville det.
translations.id: Kami tanpa sengaja membuat tetangga kami penasaran.
translations.sv: Vi gör vår granne nyfiken utan att mena det.
translations.ro: Îl intrigăm pe vecinul nostru fără să vrem.
translations.da: Vi gør vores nabo nysgerrig uden at ville det.
translations.ja: 私たちは意図せずに隣人の好奇心をそそってしまう。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun; 1st person plural; subject of 'intriguons'.
Main verb; present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive; takes 'notre voisin' as direct object; the clause is further modified by the prepositional phrase 'sans le vouloir'.
1st-person plural possessive determiner; modifies 'voisin'; part of the object NP.
Common noun; masculine singular; head of the object NP; direct object of 'intriguons'.
Preposition; introduces the non-finite complement 'le vouloir' expressing circumstance/manner ('without ...').
Clitic object pronoun; 3rd person masculine singular; direct object of the infinitive 'vouloir' within the prepositional clause.
Infinitive verb; governed by 'sans'; with 'le' forms the non-finite clause 'le vouloir', indicating absence of intention.

We intrigue our neighbor without meaning to.
